creator: freebsd@korsani.fr
text:
In make config I enable LDAP
In the config.log I got this : ./configure --with-libraries=/usr/local/lib --with-includes=/usr/local/include --enable-thread-safety --enable-nls --with-pam --with-openssl --without-gssapi --prefix=/usr/local --localstatedir=/var --mandir=/usr/local/man --infodir=/usr/local/info/ --build=i386-portbld-freebsd10.1

Note the lack of --with-ldap

It works with other options in make config, like NLS
